cancelFight(bytes32).details: Callable by resolver anytime before resolution, or by player A only before player B joins.

params.resolver_: Trusted backend wallet that resolves fights.

params.fightId: Unique identifier matching off-chain session id bytes32.
params.stakeAmount: Stake per player, denominated in token units.
params.token: ERC-20 token address used by both players.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

resolveFight(bytes32,address).details: For non-SAIRI fights, use `resolveFight(bytes32,address,uint256)` with slippage protection.

params.winnerAddress: Winner address, must be one of the two fighters.

resolveFight(bytes32,address,uint256).details: For WETH/USDC/USDT fights, `minSairiOut` is supplied by resolver based on off-chain quote/TWAP.

params.minSairiOut: Minimum SAIRI amount accepted from the house-cut swap.
params.winnerAddress: Winner address, must be one of the two fighters.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

HOUSE_PCT().notice: Percent of the pot used as house cut for burn.

UNISWAP_POOL_FEE().notice: Default Uniswap V3 pool fee tier (0.3%).

WINNER_PCT().notice: Percent of the pot paid to the winner.

cancelFight(bytes32).notice: Cancels a fight and refunds staked funds.

createFight(bytes32,address,uint256).notice: Creates a fight and stakes `stakeAmount` from player A.

emergencyWithdraw(address).notice: Allows owner to recover ERC-20 tokens held by this contract.

getFight(bytes32).notice: Returns full fight data by id.

joinFight(bytes32).notice: Joins an existing fight and stakes the same token and amount as player A.

resolveFight(bytes32,address).notice: Resolves a fight in SAIRI mode (no swap required).

resolveFight(bytes32,address,uint256).notice: Resolves a fight and distributes winner payout while burning house cut in SAIRI.

resolver().notice: Resolver wallet allowed to resolve and house-cancel fights.
